item.mystictomes.mystic_tome.desc: Combine with %s to increase its level (Max level: %s)
item.mystictomes.mystic_tome.desc_multip: Combine with any of the following enchantments to increase their level:
item.mystictomes.mystic_tome.any: Combine with any enchantment to increase its level
mystictomes.configuration.title: Mystic Tomes
config.mystictomes.tome_item_settings.to: Settings for combining items and Mystic Tomes together
config.mystictomes.wildcard_tome.tooltip:
If true, Mystic Tomes without an enchantment defined via the 'minecraft:stored_enchantments' data component will be considered a 'wildcard tome'.
These tomes will upgrade any and all allowed enchantments on a tool or book.
config.mystictomes.upgrade_cost.tooltip: Defines how many levels it should cost to upgrade an enchantment's level using a tome.
config.mystictomes.limit_break_cost.tool: Defines how many levels it should cost to limit break an enchantment's level using a tome.
config.mystictomes.add_repair_cost.toolt: If true, using a Mystic Tome on an item will add to its repair cost, meaning it will be more expensive to do future operations in an anvil.
config.mystictomes.max_limit_breaks.tool: Defines how many times an enchantment can go above its normal max level using a Mystic Tome.
config.mystictomes.tome_tome_settings.to: Settings for combining multiple Mystic Tomes together
config.mystictomes.tome_combining.toolti: If true, Mystic Tomes can be combined together in an anvil to stack their effects together in a single item.
config.mystictomes.combine_cost.tooltip: Defines how many levels it should cost to combine tomes together.
config.mystictomes.add_combine_repair_co: If true, combining Mystic Tomes will add to their repair cost, meaning it will be more expensive to do future operations in an anvil.
